subject: eol transport gtc and product description

emails.subject: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.subject_base: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.body: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description Attached for review are a draft of the GTC and Product Description for the transport capacity transactions on EOL. Please review and provide comments. Carl, If you want to meet to discuss, just let me know when.

emails.subject: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.subject_base: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.body: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description Attached for review are a draft of the GTC and Product Description for the transport capacity transactions on EOL. Please review and provide comments. Carl, If you want to meet to discuss, just let me know when.

emails.subject: Re: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.subject_base: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description
emails.body: Re: EOL Transport GTC and Product Description Gerald, I finally got a chance to review the GTC and am sending you my suggested wording changes and questions in the attached. Most of the changes I'm suggesting are driven by the changes that I think should be made to the Breach of Obligations and Remedies Section. Let's find some time Monday morning to discuss. I looked at the Product Description but did not make any changes because I think I need a better understanding of its use and legal effect. The main thing I'm concerned about is its looking like a contract for the brokering of capacity, as opposed to the description of a means for executing a capacity release transaction with a Pipeline. Let's discuss. Steve Gerald Nemec 10/31/00 04:12 PM
